CONFIDENTIALITY UNDERTAKING (INDIA)

in favour of Lotus Capital Pvt. Ltd. in connection with Project Banyan.

The Recipient acknowledges receipt of confidential information including the proposed
acquisition of Tata Innovations Ltd before public announcement to the BSE.
